---
title: "Events"
format: html
---

## 📅 Upcoming Events

<div id="upcoming-events" class="events-list"></div>

## 📂 Past Events

<div id="past-events" class="events-list"></div>

<!-- All events are defined here. JavaScript will automatically sort them into Upcoming or Past based on today's date. -->
<template id="all-events">

  <div class="event-card" data-date="2026-05-01">
    <div class="event-date">01 May 2026</div>
    <h3>TRT Türkiye'nin Sesi Radyosu Memleket Treni Programı-Konuk</h3>
    <h3>Çalışma Yaşamının Dünü ve Bugünü</h3>
    <p><a href="https://radyo.trt.net.tr/kanallar/tsr" target="_blank">🔗 Dinlemek için</a></p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card" data-date="2026-05-08">
    <div class="event-date">08 May 2026</div>
    <h3>Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program- Workshop Day</h3>
    <h3>Ankara Development Agency 2026 Social Innovation and Social Development Technical Support Programme – Project Application Workshop</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
    <a href="https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126" target="_blank">🔗 Etkinlik Detayı</a></p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card" data-date="2026-05-18">
    <div class="event-date">18 May 2026</div>
    <h3>TÜBİTAK Science Talks-2: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Yayla Mesleki ve Teknik Anadolu Lisesi, Zonguldak</p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card" data-date="2026-05-22">
    <div class="event-date">22 May 2026</div>
    <h3>TÜBİTAK Science Talks-3: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Gerede Hacı Sadık Öztosun Anadolu Lisesi, Bolu</p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card" data-date="2026-04-24">
    <div class="event-date">24 April 2026</div>
    <h3>Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 4/4</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
    <a href="https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126" target="_blank">🔗 Etkinlik Detayı</a></p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card" data-date="2026-04-17">
    <div class="event-date">17 April 2026</div>
    <h3>Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 3/4</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
    <a href="https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126" target="_blank">🔗 Etkinlik Detayı</a></p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card" data-date="2026-04-16">
    <div class="event-date">16 April 2026</div>
    <h3>TÜBİTAK Science Talks-1: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Ankara Lisesi, Ankara</p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card" data-date="2026-04-10">
    <div class="event-date">10 April 2026</div>
    <h3>Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 2/4</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
    <a href="https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126" target="_blank">🔗 Etkinlik Detayı</a></p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card" data-date="2026-04-03">
    <div class="event-date">03 April 2026</div>
    <h3>Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 1/4</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
    <a href="https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126" target="_blank">🔗 Etkinlik Detayı</a></p>
  </div>

</template>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);

  const template = document.getElementById("all-events");
  const upcomingContainer = document.getElementById("upcoming-events");
  const pastContainer = document.getElementById("past-events");

  const cards = Array.from(template.content.querySelectorAll(".event-card"));

  const upcoming = [];
  const past = [];

  cards.forEach(function (card) {
    const dateStr = card.getAttribute("data-date");
    const eventDate = new Date(dateStr);
    eventDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);

    if (eventDate >= today) {
      upcoming.push({ date: eventDate, el: card });
    } else {
      past.push({ date: eventDate, el: card });
    }
  });

  // Upcoming: ascending (soonest first)
  upcoming.sort((a, b) => a.date - b.date);
  // Past: descending (most recent first)
  past.sort((a, b) => b.date - a.date);

  upcoming.forEach(function (item) {
    upcomingContainer.appendChild(item.el);
  });

  past.forEach(function (item) {
    item.el.classList.add("past-event");
    pastContainer.appendChild(item.el);
  });

  if (upcoming.length === 0) {
    upcomingContainer.innerHTML = "<p><em>No upcoming events at the moment.</em></p>";
  }
  if (past.length === 0) {
    pastContainer.innerHTML = "<p><em>No past events.</em></p>";
  }
});
</script>
